name: Air Jordan 14 Retro PS 'Forest'
story: This iteration of the Air Jordan 14 Retro PS is a kids' shoe with a white, Dark Forest and Light Graphite color scheme. The model, first released in October 1998, was the last one Michael Jordan wore during his illustrious career with the Bulls. Its design was inspired by MJ's Ferrari, most noticeable with the Jumpman shield near the ankle and tumbled leather upper's ribbed texture. The low-cut sneaker displays Jordan's number 23 on the heel, while a white outsole rounds out the style.

name: Air Jordan 14 Retro Low TD 'Black Toe' 2006
Jordan Countdown Pack 7/16
story: Released in 2008, the ‘Countdown Pack’ was comprised of two shoes: the Air Jordan 16 and the Air Jordan 7. This was leading up to the release of the Air Jordan 23, and the two shoes in each pack numerically added up to 23. The all-black AJ16, complete with patent leather on the upper and a leather shroud covering the laces, marked the retro debut of this original colorway. The white AJ7 is a retroed version of the 1992 Hare Jordan OG, with white leather overlays contrasted with the design’s throwback, multicolored highlights. Old school Jordan branding is embroidered on the tongue.

name: Jordan Countdown Pack 7/16 (GS)
story: The Air Jordan 16/7 Retro GS ‘Countdown Pack’ was one of several two-piece packs that released in 2008 as part of the buildup to the release of the Air Jordan 23. Like its sibling packs, the two Air Jordan models add up to 23. Here, it’s grade-school editions of the Air Jordan 16 and 7 in OG colorways. The 16 is rendered in black and Varsity Red, the 7 in the popular ‘Hare’ color scheme.

name: Air Jordan 19/4 Retro GS 'Countdown Pack'
story: Part of the Jordan Countdown pack, this particular package incorporates the Jordan 19 and the Jordan 4—adding up to the number 23. Both sneakers sport the iconic ‘Bred’ color scheme, but the 19 implements a more technical design approach, featuring inspiration from a venomous African snake that’s translated onto the appearance of the lace flap, while the Tech Flex upper is designed for flexibility and support. The 4 incorporates a nubuck upper construction with a unique eyelet system that enables the wearer to customize their look and comfort.

name: Jordan 2011 Q Flight Year of the Rabbit
Jordan True Flight Bordeaux
story: The Jordan True Flight draws inspiration from the design of the Air Jordan 7, though it showcases its own unique features. The mid top features a Bordeaux nubuck and synthetic upper with cutout features around the ankle and surrounding the throat. The sneaker also sports a PU footbed with a Zoom Air insole for a cushioned foot, signature tonal Jumpman logo, and a neoprene Dynamic Fit inner sleeve.

name: Air Jordan 5 Retro PS
story: The Air Jordan 5 Retro PS presents Michael Jordan's fifth signature shoe with a white leather upper and Fire Red, Sunset and Dark Cinder accents. This kids' shoe, released in 2006, displays the Jumpman logo on its tongue and heel, mixes in mesh netting on the side panels and offers a visible Nike Air unit. Closing out the look is the midsole's jagged, WWII fighter plane-inspired design and a rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for traction.

name: Macklemore x Air Jordan 6 Retro 'Cactus' Sample
Jordan 6 Rings Bred (2013)
story: Michael Jordan wore seven different silhouettes of his signature sneaker as he captured six NBA Championships over the course of his career. The hybrid Air Jordan ‘6 Rings’ pays tribute to all of them by incorporating elements from each design, including the Huarache-style inner bootie of the Jordan 7, the adjustable straps of the Jordan 8 and on this model, the iconic Bred colorway synonymous with the OG Jordan 11.

name: Jordan 6 Rings LS Black Dark Army
story: This edition of the Air Jordan 6 Rings, a model that pays tribute to Michael Jordan's six championships with the Chicago Bulls, comes dressed in black, white, Dark Army and Varsity Red. Released in 2008, the hybrid silhouette draws inspiration from multiple iconic Air Jordan designs, including the Air Jordan 6, 7, 8, 11, 12 and 13. It features the famous Jumpman logo on the tongue and heel, and a premium upper constructed of leather and synthetics.

name: Jordan 6 Rings GS 'Carbon Fiber'
story: The Air Jordan 6 Rings GS 'Carbon Fiber' is a kids' shoe that honors Michael Jordan's six NBA championships as a member of the Chicago Bulls. Released in 2011, the shoe offers a hybrid design with elements from multiple iconic Air Jordan silhouettes. Highlights include signature branding with the Jumpman logo prominently displayed, a heel tab, lace lock, Velcro strap and a premium upper. Completing the style is an encapsulated Air-Sole unit and rubber outsole with herringbone pattern.

name: Jordan 6 Rings 'DJ Augustin' PE
story: This Air Jordan 6 Rings is an unreleased Player Exclusive created for point guard DJ Augustin. Drafted ninth overall by the Bobcats in 2008, Augustin spent his first four NBA seasons in Charlotte. First seen in 2013, the shoe features a Bobcats-like colorway and 'DJ14' on the AJ 8-inspired Velcro strap. Jumpman branding resides on a fuzzy tongue, another nod to the AJ8. The upper, with hints of the AJ11, consists of mesh and patent leather, while the outsole borrows elements from the AJ13.

name: Jordan 6 Rings TD
story: The Air Jordan 6 Rings TD is a kids' shoe that commemorates the historical run of Michael Jordan and the Chicago Bulls during the 1990s. Released in 2008, the mid-top shoe features the popular black, Varsity Red and white colorway, a heel pull tab and Velcro strap to promote a secure, supportive fit. It comes with Jumpman branding, a synthetic leather upper and design elements inspired by multiple classic Air Jordan models.

name: Jordan 6 Rings Utah
story: Dressed in colors worn by the Utah Jazz, which Michael Jordan's Chicago Bulls defeated in the 1997 and 1998 NBA Finals, this 6 Rings sneaker was released in March 2009. A hybrid of the seven Air Jordan models worn by MJ during a pair of 3-peats, its highlights include a fuzzy tongue and adjustable strap from the AJ 8, an upper silhouette and patent leather midsole from the AJ 11, and Zoom Air in the heel and forefoot, as it did in the AJ 13.

name: Air Jordan 8 Retro Low TD 'Real Pink'
Jordan Formula 23 Black
story: Interpreting design elements from MJ's classic, the Nike Air Jordan 10, the Jordan Formula 23 sneaker blends heritage style with cushioning designed to withstand extended pavement wear. Engineered mesh and a neoprene inner sleeve construct the upper, supported by leather mudguards. The injected Phylon foam midsole works in tandem with the rubber outsole for a comfortable ride.

name: A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 5 Retro OG 'Black Collective'
A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 6 Retro 'Smokey Mauve'
Jordan 39 A Ma Maniére While You Were Sleeping
story: The A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 39 'While You Were Sleeping' features a light violet textile upper, covered in a jacquard monogram pattern and accented with embroidered detailing along the side panels. Suede overlays in a dark mauve hue reinforce the forefoot, eyestay and heel. Jumpman branding decorates the tongue, while 'A Ma Maniére' is inscribed across the lateral midfoot. The cushioning setup takes the form of a lightweight ZoomX foam midsole, housed within a translucent rubber cupsole and enhanced with a bottom-loaded full-length Zoom Air unit.

name: Jordan 5 Retro A Ma Maniére Dusk
story: The A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 5 Retro ‘Dusk’ reunites the creative partners on a two sneaker collaborative pack. This pair carries a black nubuck upper, updated with a slimmed-down collar and pre-yellowed quarter panel netting formed with an interlocking series of A Ma Maniére’s signature ‘A’ logo. ‘Nike Air’ branding is embroidered on the back heel in tonal fashion, while silver reflective tongues display mismatched Jumpman and A Ma Maniére branding. The sneaker sits atop a matching black polyurethane midsole with shark-tooth detailing in a dark burgundy hue. A pre-aged translucent rubber outsole featuring the Atlanta-based retailer’s logo provides durable traction underfoot.

name: Jordan 5 Retro A Ma Maniére Dawn (PS)
story: Launching as part of a collaborative capsule collection, the A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 5 Retro PS ‘Dawn’ updates the classic silhouette for a new generation of Michael Jordan fans. The legacy silhouette dons a pale grey leather upper, accented with pre-yellowed quarter panel netting in a unique ‘A’ monogram pattern. In addition to mismatched ‘A’ and Jumpman logos on the reflective silver tongues, branding elements include a ‘23’ on the lateral heel and ‘Nike’ embroidered on the back heel. The mid-top is mounted on a black foam midsole with blue shark tooth detailing. A yellow rubber outsole provides grippy traction underfoot.

name: Jordan 5 Retro A Ma Maniére Dawn (TD)
story: Drawn from a collaborative capsule collection, the A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 5 Retro TD ‘Dawn’ features a pale grey leather upper with ‘23’ embroidered on the lateral heel. The translucent quarter panel netting is updated with an ‘A’ monogram pattern in aged finish, while reflective silver tongues are marked with mismatched ‘A’ and Jumpman logos. Embroidered Nike branding on the back heel delivers an OG-inspired touch. The scaled-down build sits atop a black foam midsole with blue shark tooth detailing. Underfoot, a yellow herringbone-tread outsole provides durable traction.

name: Jordan 12 Retro SP A Ma Maniére White (Women's)
story: The A Ma Maniére x Wmns Air Jordan 12 Retro SP ‘White’ pairs high-caliber materials with traditional two-tone color blocking. Stitched lines radiate outward on the white leather upper, fortified with midfoot overlays in a contrasting burgundy hue. Quilted textile lines the collar and insole, bringing back a design motif showcased on each of the Atlanta retailer’s previous Jordan collaborations. Mismatched Jordan and A Ma Maniére branding decorates each tongue and heel tab. The mid-top rides on a cushy Phylon midsole, enhanced with a full-length Zoom Air unit and a carbon fiber spring plate.

name: Jordan 12 Retro SP A Ma Maniére Black (Women's)
story: The A Ma Maniére x Wmns Air Jordan 12 Retro SP ‘Black’ brings a premium build to one of the most performance driven models in Jordan Brand’s heritage lineup. Waxed rope laces secure the black nubuck upper, accented with radiating stitched lines and bolstered with shaggy suede overlays in a rich burgundy hue. Mismatched branding decorates each tongue, highlighted by a molded Jumpman on the right shoe and A Ma Maniére’s ‘A’ logo on the left. Similar to the Atlanta retailer’s previous Jordan collaborations, quilted textile lines the interior for an elevated look and feel. Underfoot, a dark maroon rubber outsole is equipped with an exposed carbon fiber spring plate and herringbone traction pods in a crisp white finish.

name: Jordan 12 Retro SP A Ma Maniére Black (TD)
story: Crafted for the youngest Jordan fan in the family, the A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 12 Retro SP TD ‘Black’ delivers a luxe interpretation of the championship silhouette. James Whitner and company outfit the legacy model in black stitched nubuck with hairy suede overlays in Burgundy Crush. Waxed laces and a quilted lining accentuate the shoe’s elevated look and feel. In addition to refreshed back tabs, unique branding elements include a tonal Jumpman and A Ma Maniére’s ‘A’ logo on mismatched tongues. Underfoot, the maroon rubber outsole features white herringbone traction pods for superior grip.

name: Jordan 12 Retro SP A Ma Maniére Black (PS)
story: Made for little kids, the A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 12 Retro SP PS ‘Black’ treats the legacy silhouette to a luxurious makeover. Reuniting Jordan Brand with James Whitner’s creative team, the reimagined championship model carries an upper crafted from black nubuck with burgundy suede overlays and a satiny quilted textile lining. Jumpman logos are embossed on the top eyelets, while each back tab displays Jordan and A Ma Maniére branding. Lightweight cushioning is provided by a Phylon midsole, reinforced underfoot by a maroon rubber outsole with white herringbone traction pods.

name: Jordan 4 Retro SP A Ma Maniére Violet Ore
story: The A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 4 Retro ‘Violet Ore’ delivers an elevated take on the legacy silhouette. The Atlanta-based retailer dresses the mid-top in a muted purple nubuck upper, accented with tonal quarter panel netting and a decorative chrome rivet embedded in the lateral collar. Woven Flight tongue tags display mismatched Jumpman and A Ma Maniére branding, while molded black heel tabs feature a raised Nike Air logo. Inscribed across the interior side of each heel tab is the phrase ‘It’s not about the shoes … it’s about where you’re going.’ Quilted textile lines the collar and insole for a comfortable fit. The sneaker rides on a cream-colored polyurethane midsole with visible Air-sole cushioning in the heel.

name: Jordan 2 Retro A Ma Maniére Airness
story: The A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 2 Retro SP 'Airness' reunites the Atlanta-based retailer with Jordan Brand for collaboration no. 3. This elevated take on the AJ2 showcases an off-white cracked leather upper with burgundy piping and a translucent heel counter that extends into the midfoot. ‘Maniére’ is stamped in white lettering on the burgundy leather heel tab. Contrasting black accents settle on the laces, quilted interior lining and tongue, featuring snakeskin detailing and a retro Wings logo. The black snakeskin motif is repeated on the midsole — an exotic touch that nods to the OG Air Jordan 2 from 1986, which was made in Italy and featured a subtle reptilian texture on the leather upper.

name: Jordan 1 Retro High OG A Ma Maniére
story: The A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 1 High OG 'Airness' represents the follow-up to the creative partners’ successful Air Jordan 3 collaboration from spring 2021. The iconic silhouette replaces traditional leather construction with a textured suede upper in a subtle off-white finish. Premium touches include burgundy snakeskin on the collar and Swoosh, along with a quilted satin lining in the same autumnal hue. A traditional Wings logo is stamped on the collar flap, the interior side of which features MJ’s signature and an inscription that reads ‘You have to expect things of yourself before you can do them.’ Additional branding includes a woven tongue tag marked with dual Nike Air and A Ma Maniére logos. The high-top rides on a pre-yellowed midsole and burgundy rubber outsole.

name: Jordan 1 Retro High OG A Ma Maniére (PS)
story: Made for little kids, the A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 1 High OG PS ‘Airness’ delivers the Atlanta boutique’s refined take on the iconic silhouette. The upper is constructed from textured ivory-colored suede with contrasting burgundy accents on the snakeskin-embossed Swoosh and collar. The latter hue is repeated on the woven Nike tongue tag and the retro Wings logo imprinted on the lateral collar. ‘A Ma Maniére’ script wraps around the heel overlay. Anchoring the high-top is a cupsole that pairs off-white sidewalls and a burgundy rubber outsole.

name: Jordan 1 Retro High OG A Ma Maniére (TD)
story: Crafted in partnership with the Atlanta-based boutique, the A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 1 High OG TD ‘Airness’ gives the classic silhouette a luxe makeover. Textured ivory suede is utilized on the upper, lined in quilted burgundy textile and accented with burgundy snakeskin detailing on the Swoosh and high-cut collar. Color-matched branding elements include a woven Nike tongue tag, a retro Wings logo stamped on the lateral collar, and ‘A Ma Maniére’ script on the heel overlay. The sneaker rides on a rubber cupsole, featuring vintage off-white sidewalls and a burgundy rubber outsole.

name: Jordan 3 Retro A Ma Maniére (PS)
story: Designed in partnership with James Whitner’s luxury boutique, the A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 3 Retro SP PS ‘Raised By Women’ showcases a premium build crafted for little kids. Whitner opted for the 3 as it was the first Jordan model that his mother bought for him, and its subtle design is inspired by and made for the women in his life. The upper is constructed from tumbled white leather with grey suede overlays at the toe and heel. Grey quilted satin lines the collar and tongue, featuring a Jumpman on the right shoe and A Ma Maniére branding on the left. ‘Nike Air’ is embossed on the yellowed heel tab. The same vintage finish is applied to the foam midsole, contrasted by violet detailing that wraps around the back heel.

name: Jordan 3 Retro A Ma Maniére (TD)
story: The A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 3 Retro SP TD ‘Raised By Women’ delivers a scaled-down version of the classic silhouette designed in collaboration with James Whitner’s luxury boutique. Inspired by the women in his life, Whitner dresses the shoe in tumbled white leather with grey suede overlays and quilted satin on the interior lining. Mismatched Jumpman and A Ma Maniére branding decorates each tongue, while ‘Nike Air’ is embossed on the yellowed heel tab. The same vintage tone is repeated on the foam midsole, contrasted by wraparound detailing in a dark violet hue.

name: A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 4 Retro 'Dark Mocha'
A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 6 Retro 'Sail'
A Ma Maniére x Air Jordan 1 High OG PS 'Airness' Sample
Nike Jordan Air Ship PE SP A Ma Maniére Green Stone
story: The A Ma Maniére x Jordan Air Ship PE SP 'Green Stone' reconvenes the partner brands on their third take of the vintage '80s hoops shoe. A smooth leather upper in Summit White is offset with Green hairy suede detailing on the Swoosh and padded collar, marked with mismatched 'A' and Nike Air branding at the rear. A pre-yellowed finish is applied to the white rubber midsole, fitted with encapsulated Air-sole cushioning and supported by an aged green rubber outsole.

name: Jordan Proto Max 720 A Ma Maniere Atlanta Night
A Ma Maniére x Wmns Air Jordan 4 Retro 'While You Were Sleeping'
story: The A Ma Maniére x Women's Air Jordan 4 Retro 'While You Were Sleeping' showcases a light grey finish on the leather upper, featuring a tonal suede forefoot overlay and a deconstructed collar lined in quilted textile. Heritage details include quarter panel netting, molded eyelets and TPU support wings. Mismatched tongue tags display Jumpman and A Ma Maniére logos, while raised Nike Air branding adorns the back heel. A two-tone polyurethane midsole packs a visible Air-sole unit in the heel for lightweight cushioning.

colorway: Phantom/Metallic Pewter-Violet Ore-Light Iron Ore-Muslin-Burgundy Crush
name: Jordan 4 Retro OG SP A Ma Maniére While You Were Sleeping Phantom (Women's)
story: The A Ma Maniére x Women's Air Jordan 4 Retro 'Phantom' features a pale grey leather upper, stripped of interior padding and lined in quilted textile. A tonal overlay in hairy suede wraps around the forefoot, while quarter panel netting offers improved breathability. Jumpman and A Ma Maniére branding appears on mismatched tongue tags, while an OG-inspired Nike Air logo adorns the back heel. Lightweight cushioning arrives via a two-tone polyurethane midsole, complete with an exposed Air-sole unit in the heel.

name: Jordan 3 Retro OG SP A Ma Maniére Burgundy Crush (Women's)
story: The A Ma Maniére x Women's Air Jordan 3 Retro 'Burgundy Crush' delivers the follow-up to the partner brands' AJ3 'Raised by Women' from 2021. The legacy silhouette features a white leather upper with hairy suede accents in a rich burgundy hue. They land on the eyestay, collar, and forefoot and heel overlay. Nike Air branding adorns the molded back tab in an OG-inspired touch. The sneaker sits atop a two-tone polyurethane midsole with a visible Air-sole unit in the heel for lightweight cushioning.

name: Jordan 3 Retro OG SP A Ma Maniére While You Were Sleeping (Women's)
story: The A Ma Maniére x Women's Air Jordan 3 Retro 'While You Were Sleeping' features black tumbled leather on the upper, fortified with grey hairy suede overlays at the forefoot and heel. Perforated nubuck in a subdued Violet Ore hue appears on the eyestay and mid-cut collar, lined with quilted satin and stripped of interior padding. The tongue is similarly slimmed down and displays mismatched 'A' and Jumpman branding. A raised Nike Air logo embellishes the molded heel tab. A vintage off-white finish coats the polyurethane midsole, fitted with a visible Air-sole unit in the heel.

name: Jordan 5 Retro A Ma Maniére Dawn (Women's)
story: Launching as part of a two-piece collaborative pack, the A Ma Maniére x Women’s Air Jordan 5 Retro ‘Dawn’ sports a pale grey leather upper, revised with a slimmed-down collar and pre-yellowed quarter panel netting formed with A Ma Maniére’s ‘A’ logo. Additional branding elements include an embroidered ‘23’ on the lateral heel, Nike Air branding on the back heel, and mismatched Jumpman and ‘A’ logos on each silver reflective tongue. Blue shark tooth detailing enlivens a black polyurethane midsole with visible Air-sole cushioning in the heel. A pre-aged translucent rubber outsole features a herringbone traction pattern for optimal grip.

name: Jordan 3 Retro A Ma Maniére (Women's)
story: The A Ma Maniére x women's Air Jordan 3 Retro SP ‘Raised By Women’ treats the iconic silhouette to a premium makeover. The Atlanta-based retailer dresses the mid-top in tumbled white leather, overlaid with soft grey suede at the collar, eyestay, heel and toe. Mismatched Jumpman and A Ma Maniére branding is embroidered on each tongue, featuring a quilted lining that’s repeated on the interior collar. A subtle cream hue is applied to the molded heel panel, decorated with an embossed Nike Air logo, and polyurethane midsole. Violet-colored detailing wraps around the heel, providing a contrasting pop of color.

name: A Ma Maniére x Wmns Air Jordan 3 Retro 'While You Were Sleeping' Sample
A Tribe Called Quest x Jordan Phly CT Low 'Black Classic Green'
Jordan 1 Elevate Low Dark Grey Varsity Red (Women's)
story: The Women’s Air Jordan 1 Elevate Low ‘UNLV’ gives the foundational silhouette a fashion-forward makeover, highlighted by exaggerated tooling and a familiar palette that recalls an OG Dunk colorway from the iconic ‘Be True to Your School’ series from 1985. The low-profile leather upper pairs a dark grey base with Varsity Red overlays and a color-matched Swoosh. An outline of the Wings logo is stitched on the heel tab, while Nike Air branding is stamped on a sockliner made with genuine cork. The sneaker is mounted on an off-white platform midsole, supported by durable crimson rubber throughout the perimeter of the outsole.

name: Jordan 1 Retro Bred (1994)
story: Often referred to as “the shoe that started it all,” the Air Jordan 1 was first brought back in 1994 with the release of the Chicago-inspired Retro black and red iteration that pays tribute to Michael Jordan following his retirement. The design features premium leather throughout, as well as a white rubber midsole and solid red outsole. Signature branding details include Air Jordan logos on the lateral sides along with Nike Air logos on each tongue.

name: Jordan 1 Retro Chicago (1994)
story: The 1994 edition of the Air Jordan 1 Retro High ‘Chicago’ represents the very first time that this iconic colorway was resurrected from the archives. Like the 1985 original, this pair sports a white leather upper with contrasting overlays in a bold red finish. The signature Swoosh is rendered in basic black, matching the sneaker’s laces, padded collar and the Jordan Wings logo that embellishes the lateral ankle. A woven Nike tag is perched atop the white nylon tongue. The high-top is mounted on a durable rubber cupsole with an Air-sole heel unit encapsulated in lightweight polyurethane.

name: Jordan 1 Retro Japan White (2001)
story: The Air Jordan 1 Retro CO.JP ‘White Navy’ represents one of four extremely limited colorways that launched exclusively in Japan in 2001, marking the first time that the venerable silhouette was reissued in a non-OG makeup. This pair make use of a crisp white leather upper with navy Jumpman branding embroidered on the leather tongue. Matching navy hits make their way to the collar lining, rubber outsole and the Jordan Wings logo stamped on the lateral ankle.

name: Jordan 1 Retro Father's Day Black White
story: To commemorate Michael Jordan’s late father, Jordan Brand launched a special edition Air Jordan 1 Father’s Day Pack that included two versions of the Air Jordan 1 in June 2008. This model comes with a black tweed upper with white and black leather panels, accented by a translucent Swoosh. It also comes with an embroidered house logo on the lateral heel and a ‘Wings logo’ on the collar, while the white Air-infused midsole gives way to a black outsole.

name: Jordan 1 Retro Barons Away
story: The Barons edition of the Air Jordan 1 celebrates Michael Jordan’s professional baseball career with the Birmingham Barons. Rendered in the colors of the team’s uniforms, the shoe features a primarily black makeup with pinstriped textiles on the overlays, while the rest of the upper is formed with premium leather paneling. Additionally, a translucent application emerges on the swoosh logos with a baseball bat icon embroidered on the heel.

name: Jordan 1 Retro Opening Day White
story: Releasing in June 2008 as part of the Opening Day pack, the Air Jordan 1 ‘Baron’ takes inspiration from Michael Jordan’s brief foray into professional baseball. The shoe’s white leather upper, accented with black pinstripes and baseball-stitch detailing, gives the nod to the home uniform of the Birmingham Barons, the Double-A Southern League team that Jordan joined in 1994.

name: Jordan 1 Retro Armed Forces Pearl White
story: Part of a two-sneaker, military-inspired pack, the Air Jordan 1 'Armed Forces' sneaker is a tribute to Michael Jordan’s brother and his military service in the US Army. Released in May 2008, this iconic mid-top sports a two-tone, color block scheme on a tumbled leather upper with synthetic overlays. As the only Air Jordan model to sport prominent Nike branding, the Swoosh on this model is covered in canvas. Underfoot, a dual-tone rubber outsole complements this design.

name: Jordan 1.5 Retro Reverse Fragment
story: The Air Jordan 1.5 is a modified version of the Air Jordan 1 that combines the upper of the 1985 original with the sole unit of the Air Jordan 2. The hybrid also sports a slightly lower profile, while the iconic ‘Wings’ emblem on the collar bears ‘Nike’ lettering as opposed to the ‘Air Jordan’ found on the OG model. This edition of the 1.5 features bold black and white color-blocking across the leather construction, with hits of Soar on the outsole, overlays and Air Jordan branding.

name: Jordan 1.5 Retro Chicago (2015)
story: Released in July 2015, this Air Jordan 1.5 'Chicago' is a retro version of an unreleased prototype worn by Michael Jordan during a few games of 1985-86 rookie season. The shoe sports the iconic Varsity Red, black, and white 'Chicago' colorway with a Jordan 2 sole unit. The shoe also features a slightly lower profile than the Jordan 1 and a 'Nike' Wings logo rather than an 'Air Jordan' Wings logo.

name: Jordan 1.5 Retro Militia Green (2015)
story: The Air Jordan 1.5 is based on an early prototype model that ultimately wasn’t mass produced, although Michael Jordan did lace up a pair for a single game during his rookie year. The hybrid model combines a slightly lower-profile Air Jordan 1 upper with tooling reminiscent of the Air Jordan 2. This colorway features a reptilian texture on the Swoosh, adding a luxury touch to the classic black/gum design.

name: Jordan 1.5 Retro Bred
story: This Air Jordan 1.5 'The Return' is a retro version of an unreleased prototype worn by Michael Jordan during a few games of his rookie season. The shoe sports the iconic black and Gym Red ‘Bred’ colorway, with a white and red Jordan 2 sole unit. The shoe also features a slightly lower profile than the Jordan 1 and a ‘Nike’ wings logo rather than an ‘Air Jordan’ wings logo. The outsole sports a modified pattern.

name: Jordan 1.5 Retro Sand Dune
story: The Air Jordan 1.5 ‘The Return’ pays tribute to Michael Jordan’s return from a broken foot during the 1985-1986 season, an injury that cost him 64 games. His first game back was against the Milwaukee Bucks, who serve as the inspiration for the colorway. The hybrid shoe’s Sand Dune suede upper draws from the Jordan 1 and features Gorge Green leather accents and University Red branding. It also comes with a white midsole and gum rubber outsole, a combination based on the Jordan 2’s tooling.

name: Air Jordan 1 OG 1985 'Chicago'
story: As Michael Jordan's first signature shoe, the Nike Air Jordan 1 OG 1985 is one of the most coveted sneakers of all time. Released in September 1985 and designed by Peter Moore, it debuted the Wings logo, which appears in black on the red collar. Varsity Red stands out on the leather upper, which highlights the Nike Swoosh in black. The Air Jordan 1 was a game-changing sneaker and retains icon status both on and off the court.

name: Jordan 1 OG Royal (1985)
story: Better known as the Air Jordan 1 ‘Royal,’ this black and blue version of Michael Jordan’s first signature shoe was one in a handful of original colorways released in 1985. The iconic color combination has made retro returns in 2001, 2013, in 2015 as a low-top, and again in 2017. It blends black and Royal Blue leather atop a white full-length midsole and blue rubber outsole.

name: Air Jordan 1 Alpha GS 'White Black Blue'
